evals.prompt: 帮我创建一个修仙世界观。这个世界有三大门派：青云宗（正道领袖）、血月殿（魔道）、天机阁（中立的占卜师组织）。灵气正在衰退，近百年来修士突破金丹期的人数锐减。有一个传说中的上古秘境即将重新开启。
evals.expected_output: A worldview folder with world.md describing the xianxia setting with spiritual energy decline, factions.md with all 3 sects plus key locations, timeline.md with the ancient realm event and energy decline timeline, characters.md empty but structured. Prose should have elevated xianxia register.
expectations: Folder created under worldview/ with a xianxia-themed slug
world.md has 世界概览, 世界规则, 文化细节 sections
世界规则 covers the spiritual energy (灵气) system and its decline
factions.md lists all 3 factions: 青云宗, 血月殿, 天机阁 with distinct descriptions
factions.md includes at least one important location
timeline.md has at least 2 events (ancient realm closure, energy decline onset)
characters.md exists with proper header but no character entries yet
Prose register matches xianxia style — elevated, unhurried, not modern/casual
Details not specified by user are marked <!-- 待扩展 --> rather than invented

evals.prompt: 我的修仙世界里刚创建了一个角色：云知意，青云宗内门弟子，她的背景提到她在三十年前的灵潮事件中失去了师父。请更新世界观文件，把她加进去，并且把灵潮事件加到时间线里。
evals.expected_output: Mode 2 expansion: characters.md gets a new entry for 云知意. timeline.md gets the 灵潮事件 appended. factions.md may get a note about 青云宗 losing a senior member. world.md is NOT rewritten unless the event reveals a new world rule. Existing content is preserved — only new entries appended.
expectations: characters.md has a new entry for 云知意 with file path, identity, and faction
timeline.md has the 灵潮事件 appended in chronological order
Existing timeline entries are not modified or rewritten
Existing faction descriptions in factions.md are not rewritten
world.md is either untouched or has minimal appended detail — not rewritten
If any new detail contradicts existing lore, a <!-- ⚠️ 待协调 --> flag is added
Report lists exactly which files were updated and what was added
